He pointed out the poor ventilation of the roof and installed new vents. A quality job at a very competitive price.  Highly recommended.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ashley Zhou","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJjIMG7GGtgMrGKnoMRyPocdJErBTJLs0_A1is2YXOVsjqb_w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I can't recommend Bulletproof Roof Systems Ltd enough. 1. reasonable pricing: I searched on Google and BBB, and contacted 4 roofing companies (including Marty's) based on the rating and reviews to come check out my roof and give me a quote. Marty's pricing was very close to one of the companies, the other two were just straight-up gaugers, 1 didn't give a price and the other quoted us for almost double the money.
2. professionalism & integrity: My husband is in trades, so he has a good read on contractors. Marty stood out immediately due to his professionalism. He came prepared with a thick file of information. He patiently walked us through all the roof materials. Since we decided on shingles to start with, he narrowed it down and went into details on those. Gave us his honest opinions and never tried to oversell us on fancy options.
3. his amazing crew: Marty pretty much organized everything, cleaning, garbage bin, and porta potty. Our project was scheduled 3 months ahead, and unfortunately, when it was supposed to happen, we got rain started that week. we all worried to guts on the quality and the safety. I believe I messaged Marty 3 times due to this rain. He was patient and assured me they wouldn't work in the rain and they would ensure everything was covered and the quality of the work. I gotta say, just trust the process. They are professional, my roof was done beautifully with no leaks. His crew cleaned up the site at the end of the project, it was such a peace of mind.

TL;DR, HIRE MARTY FOR YOUR ROOF. I did a ton of research prior to hiring Marty and went through the process with his team. Just knowing his team is working on my roof, fixing fascia boards,  skylights, and chimney is complete peace of mind. I did not need to do anything or worry at all.

[{"Name":"kel din","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK5LzYDiAE2D7pyAt2ADMn6TJYLCyUdnE-Ib97RrlPAZxSvsQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had our hidden gutters repaired by Aldergrove roofing.
The drains kept plugging up with small leaves and debris, there were holes in the membrane identified by Murat that we weren't aware of.
Murat and his team were very responsive to any communication and provided a very reasonable quote outlining his recommendations. We felt very comfortable dealing with Murat and trusted his expertise.
He upgraded our drains from 2" to 3" and also patch repaired areas that were leaking.
Were very pleased with the worked performed and the ease in dealing with Murat.  He and his team are very nice and we wouldn't hesitate to recommend him!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBK0WMgFwXLWoHURFuUfSxP&fid=0x0:0x6820caaf71a30f74"],"When":"2025-10-14"},{"Name":"Tammi Heavener","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLWmsQNlPPXyHbKbsmSmYF4H3AoyGnBEg0nYJCpx_GIcKtAmw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I first met Murak from Aldergrove Roofing 9 years ago when I had just purchased my home. After a huge snowfall and then an ice storm when it all started to melt, I had water pouring in. I called Aldergrove roofing and Murak came and explained to me why this was happening and promptly fixed the issue.
Fast forward 9 years later, I was told by a different contractor that I needed a new roof.
I called Murak and he got back to me right away and came and had a look. This man is very honest and hardworking and very skilled at his craft. All fixed and cost just over 1500 bucks.
Get on his maintenance list, talk about peace of mind, whew!
Call Aldergrove Roofing the next time you need your roof repaired, replaced or maintained, you will be glad you did!
I know I am .. you’ve got a customer for life with me and anyone else I know.
Thanks Murak 😊","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Verena Dever","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIEVGMwRU7zZeVaDzqo6M5IbBiQJyseVRXbwcf1Xq0ZvNhhCw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Murat did an excellent job repairing my roof, replacing tiles and vents.  He communicated throughout the process and send pictures as to the required repairs. He is professional and friendly.
I can highly recommend Aldergrove Roofing and would only use them in the future.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michael Pinter","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX8m68ntmVOOD3looD9Q4j1mvGGtCFS1Uhf5wLR82P9owGhrT7N=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We recently had a leak in our concrete tiled roof and reached out to Aldergrove Roofing for help. I spoke with Murat, and I can’t say enough good things about the experience.

He was very friendly, professional, and an excellent communicator from start to finish. He quickly identified the source of the problem and clearly explained what needed to be done. The repair was carried out promptly and efficiently, and he kept us well informed throughout the entire process.

It’s such a relief to find a company that is knowledgeable, responsive, and genuinely cares about their customers. I would highly recommend Aldergrove Roofing to anyone needing roofing repairs.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Al Eichler","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUixbHjw1Ym0GB2QBIIW6H_oFRJwhWZLkdwNjD0iqzkow3d3Tb6=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Murat did an impeccable job on our roof. We had a leak on the ridge cap of our cement tile roof. Murat checked the attic for water stains and installed a full lead strip under the ridge. Murat is very helpful, knowledgeable and extremely friendly. If you want a good done don’t hesitate to hire him.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCo4avI3AE&fid=0x0:0x6820caaf71a30f74"],"When":"2025-4-17"},{"Name":"Kelsey Andison","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKSGYoa2j8SrUM48rpixKbYi5QYzec8xt59_y9GiSied3EoXw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Murat was great! He was very communicative and did a fantastic job after cleaning up our concrete tile roof. Would highly recommend and will be using aldergrove roofing again.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"victor hung","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJz0ppnSt6z8L1PJ5SNxh1n9O7K9kNGatx_3cfEc3jzhLc2qwDS=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Murat and his team found out my roof real leaking spot and fixed the problem.
In the beginning, we thought it was the gutter leaking. Some of our friends came to fix but it’s still leaking into my bed room. However, Aldergrove Roofing found the real problem which was the crack vents on the roof. They fixed it. It’s no more leak now. They are so professional and detailed handling the roof and gutters. We will hire them to replace our old hidden gutter membrane. They really earned our trust! Such a reliable company !","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ash","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL9579yEZku60_LlGsG9jDJ1c_1aJARoV94IY_97welSfUziA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"**⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐** Amazing!!!
Best Roofing company around!
We hired Aldergrove Roofing to repair some cracked tiles on our roof and we couldn’t be happier..Murat & his team came out right away! They were very professional, honest, and efficient from start to finish. The repair was done quick and looks great!! I highly recommend Aldergrove Roofing for quality work you can trust!","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Saskia Wells","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJxEQmN2hLepZZSgzKOWKnvxdDmZbbyWTLCFgouYauOt8Wxnw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"If I could give zero stars, I would.
JDM replaced our roof approximately two years ago, and it is already leaking. A roof should not fail this quickly,regardless of any warranty.
Although they claim to offer a 10-year warranty, we did not trust them to repair the damage because:
1.	A roof should never be leaking after 2–3 years, and
2.	We previously asked them to fix other issues, which were never properly addressed.

The leaks have been occurring for some time and resulted in mouldy insulation that had to be fully replaced. Another roofing company inspected the attic and documented multiple serious issues, including:
•	Incorrectly installed flashing causing leaks
•	An extractor vent they installed that caused cold drafts
•	Mould on the attic walls
•	Additional installation problems that should never have passed inspection

I contacted the owner directly and provided photo evidence. He refused to take responsibility and then stopped responding entirely. The bare minimum would have been a reply.
Based on how the owner has responded to other negative reviews, I expect he may try to deflect blame here as well, but the facts remain:
A roof should not leak after only a couple of years.
We are now paying out of pocket to fix problems that should never have existed in the first place.
Do not hire this company.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Steve McCartney","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJSqhIrSnUZ25U2qdrVY-Dt-FYhwnF7LpCQAW_KJKEsy-CDEg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"During the most recent atmospheric river, our cabin's roof started to leak. Reply to your reply.
You came on a Saturday, said in your message you would get me the estimate by Wednesday, when you left you said you would have it to me on Thursday.  Nothing from you for over week.  I messaged you Monday night looking for an update. You replied, it’s done I will drop it off in the morning.  I waited around all morning, changing my schedule around.  You didn’t show up, no messages, no communication at all. I then wrote the review.  I then went on with my day.  Came home to an envelope on my door step. So yes I guess you did get me my estimate thanks.  Guess you saw the negative review and then dropped it off.

As for roofer time.
The other company I got a quote from. Set a time for the inspection. Showed up when they said they would. Actually inspected the roof and my attic spaces. Then set up a time for the estimate.  Showed up on time for the estimate and provided it to me in a professional manner.

[{"Name":"Edward Karlsalr","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU-B5IFhuwAWC8FEbPn8icyZMJrxCtMbNllpTZ1n380YBWl6OQn=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Will replaced our roof and I couldn’t be happier. I would give him more stars if I could.

We had a leak because the roof wasn’t sheeted properly, and he took care of everything. He always answered the phone, showed up on time, and even started early and worked a weekend to beat the rain.

He uses top quality materials, is professional, and delivers exactly what he promises.

On top of that, his price was the best we found. If you need your roof replaced, don’t think twice, Will is the guy!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tian Duan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUEPOWdV8dkBxW96mMFH4gTP2TATrVCAW-ZzXz04Q2qxMVzSePF=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had recurring roof leaks at my old house in Abbotsford, which persisted despite multiple repairs. I consulted several roofing contractors, and one even suggested replacing the entire roof, quoting me $50k, which I found far too expensive. Last month, it leaked again after a rainstorm, so I reached out to Wilway. Although he was busy, he came by a week later and took a look.

Wilway assessed my roof, which is a metal, industrial-level one, and assured me that the roof itself had no issues. Instead, he discovered a hole in the exterior wall and identified areas of the siding that needed resealing. Last week, he arranged for his team to fix everything. This week, we had record-breaking rainfall in Greater Vancouver, and thankfully, there have been no more leaks.

Wilway did an excellent job. His pricing was very reasonable, and unlike some other contractors who were quick to suggest a full roof replacement, he focused on solving the actual problem. He even told me that if it leaks again, he’d come back and fix it for free, but only for this one time—though it seems that won’t be necessary! I highly recommend him for anyone needing an honest and reliable roofing contractor.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICXm-WcrQE&fid=0x0:0xf678e34f7258e075"],"When":"2024-10-20"},{"Name":"Valerie Anderson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLcDc0Y0ivMEzND_x9_0a6gzS-1jKV0sDInzSCeJc6Gh7KLZA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Much to my surprise I  discovered that a squirrel had taken residence in my attic. Had a pest control company come out and they installed mesh in all the areas that they thought the squirrel was making it’s way in and installed a one way door to allow the squirrel to get out but not back in. Well the squirrel was not to be deterred and proceeded to destroy my one year old roof vent to get back in. Back came the pest control company who now installed mesh over the vent with another one wet door. After getting rid of the squirrel and her two babies I now had to get my roof vent replaced. Lucky for me my neighbours we getting their roof replaced so I went over to ask Will how much he would charge me to take care of this. He said he would do it for free. Well much to my dismay, Will discovered that the pest control company had applied the mesh using a ton of staples directly into my shingles. Now it was a much bigger job!!!  Will provided a quote to replace the shingles and end caps which the pest control company agreed to cover. Will was here today and made all the necessary repairs and still did not charge me for the roof vent or it’s installation. I am very pleased with how Will came to the rescue and am very happy for his professional approach. Can’t thank him enough.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDx3N_VcQ&fid=0x0:0xf678e34f7258e075"],"When":"2023-6-4"},{"Name":"jesse Eby","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWD5mZOjpgQ1CNxVMQ5gpFulYbVKChzkZjFF_G6ez-N73agWH2C=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently had the pleasure of working with Wilway Roofing, and I couldn't be more impressed with their service. From the initial consultation to the final inspection, their team demonstrated exceptional professionalism and expertise. They were prompt, transparent in their communication, and provided a detailed breakdown of the work needed. The quality of the roofing job was outstanding, and they completed it on time and within budget. Their attention to detail and commitment to customer satisfaction truly set them apart. I highly recommend Wilway Roofing for anyone in need of reliable and high-quality roofing services.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Brian McGowan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIqdav3oKC85qog_HcVdfmXm5Y_b-7EMHSd49_wr5SQzcKkew=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a leak in my metal roof, was leaking for quite some time through my soffit onto my deck. I highly recommend Willway for any of your roofing needs.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"2010doxylulu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWArZnl9xCCSvtQvCmnIddddrF9IYlfmRjBzb5J-Nj48isjTn0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have used many contractors and Wilway Roofing went above and beyond. His crew was professional, friendly, fast and extremely clean! There was never garbage or shingles or any mess during the whole project. I was quoted a time of completion and the project was done prior to the projected completion date! We also chose this company for its impeccable warranty!
I would highly recommend this company and their workmanship!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Breanne Sinosich","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUqlel-G1IJXGNzTlV5Dqyo5snDKYlATEA8eRUFokq-XfwfWw24=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were in need of extensive repairs to our garden shed roof and reached out to Wilway Roofing. The result was perfect! We were so impressed we also asked for a free assessment of our house roof, and with a drone and manual visual inspection he was able to itemize specifically all deficiencies, and provide us with a quote to repair to extend the usable life of our roof. I was very impressed, and would highly recommend them to anyone.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Empower Lifestyle and Fitness","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVLMMKHtC9Wb-32IBYMw6yd61r3EbIjZXVIxMDLvLtQD4rX8OY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I would highly recommend this company over and over again!

The crew showed up and within hours they had our roof stripped off and tarped.
The next day they were up there working tirelessly in the freezing cold weather, and we’re done within a couple days!
The crew was great. Such a good group of hard working men.
I cannot thank you enough for taking care of our home.","Images":null,"When":""}]

The lights look great and the lighting schemes, patterns, and colour options are endless. The app could use some upgrades but it gets the job done. The timer feature is handy. Also nice that you can control sections separately (e.g. front and back). Very happy with the purchase.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDcc0qxYRVGMQ9ua24zYp7J&fid=0x0:0x12b83df8de315e4a"],"When":"2026-2-22"},{"Name":"Nikki Boucher","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVz3euYi6yjtRdlITwx2uHyNSVl70_TdV9u0r91ifzF2LIPhn_W=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I absolutely love our new lights! We were introduced to Magnificent Lighting Co at the Home Expo. I had always been interested in permanent lighting, and now that we now own our home we decided to get a quote done.

The sales team was so incredibly amazing to deal with. They were so kind, knowledgeable, explained everything we needed to know and were not pushy at all. In the end, I couldn't help but say YES!

The installation went relatively good. The install took a couple hours to complete, amd we were given a quick run down on how to use the app. The clean up wasn't the best, until we asked them to go around again as we kept finding nails. The overall craftsmanship of the install was poor in some areas, but after sending in photos of the areas, they came right back a few days later and fixed everything until we were 100% satisfied with the work. When you spend that much on lighting, you expect good craftsmanship as well, not just great service and beautiful looking lights!

Overall, I would recommend these guys to anyone! I am so happy that we went ahead and got them installed!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDihAZmOtXzdCbBUQMirhmH&fid=0x0:0x12b83df8de315e4a"],"When":"2026-2-24"},{"Name":"Diana Barchard","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVjRP3J4jcbkxB6Ta3Wp8CtylF_nUHUJpBoA_eR7UUHt546Jllh=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have rarely had an experience this good ( should I say magnificent) when dealing with home trades. They even walked our driveway a few times to make sure there weren’t any screws left behind. They also walked me through the app and made sure I knew how to select scenes and set the timers. Walter and Karen","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nina Aurora","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIjmhhNK0iy2LivsBwU7bfxIJnGuGdS0Dq_DJSx-6NnSla28Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Peakmasters just installed our roof in Surrey. I would highly recommend this company.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ronn Roughley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKHceFNxwivaInI_I3ku3bHRr4DM07Q0gMx85UOGQiNBSyplQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Marc was helpful, patient, personable and not greedy with pricing.

Elmer and his crew were a pleasant and very hard working crew. Elmer was approachable to any questions/concerns I had about the job so that was appreciated.

Communication could be improved. Without any notice or message they just showed up one morning in October to do the roofing.
An important email regarding my questions about gutters was not responded to for a month (when I asked Marc about this at the job site he said that they would return in the summer to install a repair). I will update this review if they do return.

Some minor issues like 2 different styles of bath vents installed (1 plastic with a damper and 1 metal with no damper), some nails and screws leftover on driveway and had a minor water leak during the install.

Overall I am quite satisfied with Peakmasters roofing work and would recommend them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Linda Watson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIZrS1znhj91MpN9lya1JWoy2CI0GUuJ4NEIc4NYlgC086LvQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We heard a loud noise but couldn’t see anything wrong until putting laundry away in ensuite and found it! Marc pulled one of his crew from a job to come see what caused our problem. They were here within 24 hours and had the problem fixed. I was pleased they were able to do a repair and not the whole roof. If it does need it down the way, we will be calling Peakmasters to do it. I recommend them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Philip Wong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJvl5lRRE5K1QsX0ymlBRJDfa05AwfitfsQc1REwp1HVB8AJA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Glen Rowley, Enviroshake Regional Sales Manager BC, WA, & OR recommended Peakmasters inc. to install the Enviroshake shake roof based on my stipulations.

Marc Barre, CEO & Owner of Peakmasters Inc. performed an on-site inspection, addressed my concerns and more importantly my wife's concerns. Trust was our primary concern and Marc removed the fear of choosing the right roofing company for our home.
The roofing crew headed by Elmer was impressive! They were professional, prompt, efficient, knowledgeable, hardworking, and completed the re-roofing job installing the Enviroshake aged cedar colour shakes with Lamenco ridge venting on time as promised. It was a breath of fresh air watching an experienced crew working together synchronizing their skills in their trade.
Luke, Marc's son dropped off more material for the job and told me that he is working with his father, learning the trade and sticking with it for the long haul. This is great news to hear about Peakmasters long-term growth when the Enviroshake shakes comes with a limited lifetime warranty that is fully transferable within the first 50 years.
I have dealt with countless contractors in the building trade, Peakmasters Inc. is a top-tier company in my books.

I would highly recommend Peakmasters Inc.

Philip Wong
North Vancouver","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Dani Vachon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ-1WTBui8Nvhccx5d9BtONyvWIR2fGzykWpro0MWFVXkVpkuo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I’ve come back after a year and a half to edit my review. I had given Positive Solar Energy (PSE) a good review because Joel explained heat pumps and the rebate process with the government to us in a pretty clear way.

Unfortunately, as it turns out, after thousands in additional HVAC fees from another supplier, we have just come through two winters with faulty heating. Issues of note:

1. The unit that was installed is too small for the size of our house. Therefore it cannot heat our home at temperatures under -1C or below, even though it is graded for -30C.
2. There were several code violations, during installation that were identified and we have since paid to rectify.
3. The unit was installed in our home despite an insufficient number of cold air returns. We’ve since paid to fix that. Apparently there is also an issue relating to our garage that our new HVAC person has said would have lead him to refuse installation in the first place.
4. There was no surge protector installed on the unit, and the motherboard crapped out in a storm. Joel said he came back to install a new motherboard and a surge protector (after six weeks wait without heat) but our new HVAC contractor has confirmed that no surge protector was installed at all.

There are more things, but honestly, we’ve spent so much time fussing about and paying for this faulty installation that I don’t want to spend any more time on this review.

It seems PSA is out of business now, but we believe Joel Winterburn may have started a new business under the name “Winterburn Heating Plus”. Please carefully check reviews and testimonials for Winterburn Heating Plus if that’s a direction you’re looking to go for you heating and energy needs.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Pauline Carey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLfF6I2O3YTTByHgz0WnKcoiqMTu1HS5smkFcXBJ941omPGvQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Joel upgraded electrical panel to 200 amps. TechBC identified multiple electrical code violations requiring extensive repair costing me over $4K.  Joel replaced gas furnace & hot water heater with heat pump & hybrid water heater.  He failed to cap the gas-line in the crawl space, resulting in gas leak  identified by Fortis as due to his error. Joel did the repair but Fortis returned when gas smell persisted, and had to do a second repair.  The heat pump he installed failed within 3 months and he had to return and repair. Joel's unqualified assistants installed a vent on the roof for the heat recovery ventilation system he installed. The vent installation was botched (wrong kind of vent, holes left in roof)- he did not check their work - and had to be repaired by a professional roofer.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michelle VA","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUlOnVrDzwn2a0g5qTGllSrVyfMEvPyasFANVj4Vmz6iaTPht5ZmA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Do not use this company. Joel is a scammer and will screw up your heat pump and electrical. We've had to call him several times to come fix his mistakes. He does things just as bandaids. First of all he didn't install the heat pump correctly. The electrical was done wrong, he used our old air conditioner pad for the pump which made the unit freeze up. The refrigerant kept leaking with his shoddy job and now the heat pump is broken. We've been without heat for a month now through the winter. Joel won't call us back when we called. We now had to call a different company to help us with getting a new pump under warranty however we still need to pay this new company $3500 to install it and fix all Joel's mistakes.  DO NOT hire Joel or his company for anything. He is a scammer. We are so angry with this guy. We will be contacting hydro and making a complaint about him.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Renate M. Meinicke","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIjU27DhA_1W9tkonYKi9t9Qaj8DwBoYZSc4MeJWFlYXh8nvg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I met the " owner " of this "Business "? in October of 2021 and after finding what it entailed, doing a little research into the business  i became very interested ,as I needed to upgrade my living comfort.Ttowards the middle of November I decided to work with Mr Winterburn , as he had presented me with a very impressive portfolio.We decided to explore what is hidden in the walls and also explore the condition of the fireplace.   All in all, Mr Winterburn did a lot of dismantling of my Garage walls and the outside wall on my Balcony. Seeing the effort he put in , I decided to pay a downpayment of $10K , which was a big mistake , as that was the last of Mr. Winterburn . Since then he has come up with all kinds of excuses , why he won't be able to finish the work . . He has left my Garage inoperational and the outside Balcony wall unfinished .  His intention was to install HVAC but has not done so . I believe Mr. Winter is a dishonest man, as the "work" that he was performing is not worth $10 K. Even if it were finished ,it would not be more than $ 3K  He does not offer any solutions to the problem  or make an effort to come and resolve the problem.
Monday january 17th , 2022                    I went to Mission BC  today to see the owner Mr. Wintergreen.
The business he is using is a Cell Phone shop , which displays empty merchandise boxes for  Positive Solar Energy HVAC.
THE  BUSINESS IS JUST A RUSE","Images":null,"When":""}]

Lately, though, I’ve noticed quite a decline. I’ve gone in several times looking for specific items that used to always be in stock, only to leave empty-handed. It’s disappointing to see what was once such a well-stocked, reliable store becoming harder and harder to count on.

Pro Contractors will be my go to company now and in the future.

I wish I had more contractors like Jeff and his team at Pro Contractors to work with throughout Western Canada.

We at A.S.A.P. Contracting Services Ltd. highly recommend!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mike Dawe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIVSV2TYymrqonrQ_Mu_I4ltEecsiGiFZ-ZXXe-cvq4UmOAKg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My wife and I hired Jeff and his team for extensive upgrades of our 35+ year old house, and we couldn't have been happier with the results. Throughout the entire process they were professional, patient, thorough, and more importantly trustworthy, this extends to all the sub-trades that Jeff uses as well. By the end of it all our kids knew Jeff as Uncle Jeff, and were sad when the work was finished and they weren't coming around anymore (Jeff still pops in for coffee periodically though).

When the reno began, we only had a rough idea of what we wanted, but not only did Jeff and his crew have good ideas, once ideas were presented, they would give us ample time to make a decision without being pushy in any way, moreover, Jeff seemed to spend ample time mulling over the rough plans back at home, and would frequently be in contact with us so we could bounce ideas off each other. It seemed like no project began without looking at it from every angle, how it would present visually, but also how the design would function in our day to day life. At the end of each project, if something wasn't maybe quite what we had in mind, Jeff would make it right.....every time.....without fail.

Pro Contractors were recommended to us by friends of ours who used them to re-do their kitchen, as well as a local Draftsman we know, who told us that Jeff would be his #1 choice to tackle the project we had in mind. Both of them were spot on in their recommendations, and we wouldn't hesitate to use their services again.

Update 2 years later......

Contacted Jeff regarding one of the plumbing fixtures needing warranty work(no fault of Jeff at all), I wasn't expecting him to do any of the actual work on the repair, just needed to know if I had to go through him as it was purchased under his account, turns out I didn't have to. I thanked him for his time and we all went on our merry way, now unbeknownst to me, by the time I contacted the distributor the next morning, Jeff already had the part on order for me with the warranty details already taken care of, just goes to show that once you're a customer of Jeff and his team, you're always a customer, still can't recommend these guys enough!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tracey Horner","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJC4IsKv_JIlo4eg4mQV7tSB0VxAy5cnIQGMY5CfiJeiMpj_w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Jeff and his crew did a remarkable job on my home renovations. I would highly recommend Pro Contractors to anyone who needs work done. I also want to mention that Jeff was fair and kept costs as per our contract. Give them a try, you won’t regret it!

Tracey Horner","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Blair Vanstone","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIFSwaAiyxXEB-zv8PSMIyY6tMyzqfeYK5FgdTjkkMTgkYjtg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Jeff and the team at Pro-Contractors Ltd. have been amazing to work with.
